# Brunei Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Brunei's administrative hierarchy:
> 4 districts, 42 subdistricts, 438 villages.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total districts: 4
- Total subdistricts: 42
- Total villages: 438
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-27
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All districts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-district.json)
- [All subdistricts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-mukim.json)
- [All villages (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-kampong.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by District

- [Belait](https://github.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/belait-bn-be/) — 8 subdistricts, 83 villages
- [Tutong](https://github.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/tutong-bn-tu/) — 9 subdistricts, 84 villages
- [Brunei-Muara](https://github.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/brunei-muara-bn-bm/) — 19 subdistricts, 197 villages
- [Temburong](https://github.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/temburong-bn-te/) — 6 subdistricts, 74 villages

## Per-District Full Data

- [Belait](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/belait-bn-be.txt)
- [Tutong](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/tutong-bn-tu.txt)
- [Brunei-Muara](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/brunei-muara-bn-bm.txt)
- [Temburong](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/temburong-bn-te.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (district), 2 (subdistrict), 3 (village)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Brunei Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions
